seo.title: Christmas x Fisheye Effect Poster – Holiday Ad Generator | OpenCreator
seo.description: Create playful Christmas poster ads with fisheye-style effects using AI. Turn simple product or scene prompts into scroll-stopping holiday creatives for social and campaigns.

hero.title: Christmas x Fisheye Effect Poster
hero.description: Turn your Christmas campaign ideas into bold fisheye-effect poster ads with AI. Generate playful, eye-catching holiday visuals that feel native to social feeds and promo pages—without starting from a blank canvas.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Describe your Christmas offer or product scene

steps.title: Describe your Christmas promo and vibe
steps.description: Start with a short brief about your offer, product, and campaign mood—such as cozy, playful, or high-energy holiday sale.

steps.title: Add details about the fisheye look
steps.description: Tell the workflow how strong you want the fisheye effect to feel and what elements should be emphasized (product, character, logo, or headline).

steps.title: Generate AI-powered Christmas poster concepts
steps.description: The workflow turns your brief into holiday-ready poster creatives that combine Christmas elements with an eye-catching fisheye distortion style.

steps.title: Refine variations and export for campaigns
steps.description: Pick your favorite versions, iterate if needed, then download final creatives ready for social posts, paid ads, and landing pages.

whoIsFor.title: For holiday campaigns that need to pop
whoIsFor.subtitle: Perfect for brands and creators planning Christmas promotions across social and paid media.

items.question: What is the Christmas x Fisheye Effect Poster workflow?
items.answer: Christmas x Fisheye Effect Poster is an AI workflow that generates Christmas-themed poster ads with a playful fisheye visual style. It helps you create bold holiday creatives for social and campaigns from simple text briefs.

items.question: Do I need to provide my own assets?
items.answer: You can start from text-only prompts or optionally include product photos or brand elements. The workflow will incorporate your inputs into fisheye-style holiday posters.

items.question: Is this only for e-commerce brands?
items.answer: No. Any brand, creator, or organization running Christmas campaigns on social or digital channels can use this workflow to produce holiday-themed posters.

items.question: Where can I use the generated posters?
items.answer: You can use them as social media posts, paid ad creatives, website hero banners, in-app banners, or email campaign visuals during the holiday season.

items.question: Can I control how strong the fisheye effect is?
items.answer: Yes. By adjusting your prompt and feedback, you can guide the workflow toward more subtle or more exaggerated fisheye distortion in your posters.

items.question: How is pricing handled for this workflow?
items.answer: Each run consumes credits based on the underlying image generation steps. It is optimized so you can explore multiple creative directions for your Christmas campaigns at a reasonable cost.
